title: Conditional in6_addr definition for standalone use
description:
ipv6_addr.h:35-47 defines struct in6_addr only when CONFIG_NET_IPV6 is not defined. This allows the module to work standalone (without Zephyr networking) while remaining compatible when networking is enabled.

Worth defending because:
1. Enables testing ipv6_addr.c without full Zephyr net stack
2. Avoids redefinition conflict when net_ip.h is included
3. Comment explains the dual-use design

If someone suggests 'simplifying' by always including Zephyr's definition, push back: this breaks the standalone use case documented in the header comment ('does not depend on Zephyr's networking stack').
close_reason: Positive review findings - worth defending, not fixing
